summary: On March 25-26, 2026, Russian operators from the "Rubikon" Center conducted combat operations in Donbas, the Sumy direction, and near Krasny Liman, eliminating 127 Ukrainian personnel and fixed-wing UAVs on the 25th, and 114 on the 26th. In Kharkiv region, FPV drones destroyed a Ukrainian UAV control post in Karachne. In Donetsk region, FPV drones struck a Russian Ka-52 helicopter after it crash-landed near Nadiivka, killing the crew during their evacuation attempt. Meanwhile, the "Apachi" unit continued using strike drones to detect and destroy Russian infiltration positions on the Sloviansk front.
